findings.title: Synthetic finding A (both models) — inline anchor validation
findings.snippet: - anchor A — a synthetic "confirmed" dual-review finding is anchored to this line.
findings.scenario: Synthetic finding used only to validate that ritual pr-comment --inline posts an anchored review comment at file:line on a real PR head commit.

findings.title: Synthetic finding B (single model) — second inline anchor
findings.snippet: - anchor B — a second synthetic finding is anchored to this line to prove multiple inline posts.
findings.scenario: Second synthetic finding; proves multiple inline comments post in one run and that the single-source (single) marker renders.

findings.title: Dismissed finding — must NOT reach the PR
findings.scenario: Resolved (dismissed) findings are excluded from both the summary table and inline comments; its absence on the PR is the assertion.

findings.title: Unconfirmed finding — must NOT reach the PR
findings.scenario: Only cross-model confirmed findings are posted; an unconfirmed verdict is filtered out.
